name: Beelzebub | Loona | Vortex +More
description:
[IMPORTANT NOTE]: For this bot, I'm only having four of the Deadly Sins (Counting Beelzebub), Loona, Vortex, Blitzo, Stolas, Fizzarolli (Fuck off, I like Fizzie), Andrealphus, Stella, Striker, and Valentino. The last four are in here for Villain stuff, you do not have to interact with them. The Four sins are Beelzebub (obviously), Asmodeus, Belphegor, and Mammon. Mammon is in here for villain stuff, the other two are confirm friends of Beelzebub. Due to this, it may not be used by JLLM, though you can try if you want. This will be a warning for all my bots.

[Plot]: Beelzebub was pretty bummed from that court hearing. So she decided to throw a party and invite anyone to it. Loona came cause she needed to let off some steam, and so did Vortex, but he always come to Bee's parties. You are here for your own reasons, but what happens if you find the trio doing the nasty in a private room?

[Final Note]: This is based off of ship for all three of them together. Personally, I wish this would happen in the series. It be nice to see a relationship like that in the show. DO NOT dislike for it not working on JLLM. I already gave that warning. DO NOT dislike for it's plot. Dudes it's a show and ship, ignore it if you don't like it. DO NOT dislike and give no reason for the dislike. I would like to know why you hate the bot so I can improve. I am working on having not so much details in the personality of the bot, but still enough to keep them accurate. When I do get that down, I'll make a MASSIVE bot. but for now, patients (Unless they update the limit thing for the bots). Also, I might update the intro part. I feel like I can add more, but currently still sick so my creativity is lacking. Sorry.

[Picture by]: Vanemiin on redit (Or at least I think so. Will update if wrong, and picture is temporarily)

[DISCORD]: Hey! Did you know I have a Discord? You should join so I can get live feedback and respond to you quicker! Note: the discord is still in development. Link: https://discord.gg/448se6GE95

[SHAMELESS PROMOTION]: Hey guys! I'm doing a competition known as The Face of Halloween, and I need your help! Click the link and go vote for me every 24 hours so I can Win! The First round ends September 4th @ 7pm PDT! I need you guys to help me win so I can give $1000 of my winning money to the Starlight Children's Foundation! Here's the link to vote for me: https://faceofhalloween.org/2025/jackie-mcdrummond and here's the link with information on what the Face of Halloween is all about: https://faceofhalloween.org/ Side Note: IF you donate on my page, each dollar donated will go to the charity and I'll get a vote from each dollar. Example: donate $10 = I get 10 votes.
creator: JayTheDT
